% fig_lec07_difference.tex — Difference of two derivative operators is algebraic
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec07_lec08.jl
%
% Vector field W on M with chart-α components W^u ≡ 1, W^v ≡ 0
% (so it is "constant in chart α").  At several points the lifted vector
% W|_q = ∂_u Φ|_q is drawn — visibly tilted with the surface.
%
% Two connections on M:
%   ∂_a   = chart-α partial derivative   ⇒ ∂_X W^σ = X^a ∂_a(W^σ) = 0
%   ∇_a   = Levi-Civita (induced metric) ⇒ ∇_X W^σ = X^a Γ^σ_{a,c} W^c ≠ 0
% Both satisfy axioms (0)–(5).  Their difference is therefore the
% algebraic C-tensor evaluated on  W|_p  alone:
%   (∇_X − ∂_X) W|_p  =  Γ^σ_{u,u}|_p  ∂_σ Φ.
% At the focal point p = (-1, 1.5) we draw  ∇_X W  scaled ×7 for visibility.

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
      width=10.0cm, height=6.2cm,
      view={-32}{34},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec07_surface.dat};

    % Field of W vectors at several points (chart-constant, hence ∂W = 0)
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=4.5pt, width=3pt]},
      banana!70!black, line width=0.85pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec07_diff_W_field.dat};

    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.4pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec07_diff_field_points.dat};

    % Focal point p (drawn larger / on top)
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=2.2pt, birrenred!85!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec07_diff_p.dat};

    % W at p (re-drawn with a slightly different style for emphasis)
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]},
      banana!90!black, line width=1.1pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec07_diff_W_at_p.dat};

    % Levi-Civita correction ∇_X W at p (= the C-tensor contribution; ∂_X W = 0)
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]},
      birrenred!85!black, line width=1.1pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec07_diff_covdXW.dat};

    % Labels
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
      at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:0.4,1.5,0.85) {$W^a$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=birrenred!85!black, anchor=west]
      at (axis cs:-0.85,1.40,0.45) {$p$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=birrenred!85!black, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:-2.40,1.30,1.05)
      {$(\widetilde\covd_a-\covd_a)\,W^a\;\;[\times 7]$};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
